V0200A03B_VISL_FUNC_CPL_CD V0200A03B_VISL_FUNC_CPL_CD V0200A03B Visual Function Addressed in Care Plan Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the Visual Function care area was addressed in the care plan. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
570 V0200A04A_COMMUN_CTR_CD V0200A04A_COMMUN_CTR_CD V0200A04A Communication Care Area Trigger Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the Communication CA was triggered. -=Not assessed/no
